message:
feat(ingest): Complete pane selection filter implementation

Multi-agent implementation of core ingest subsystems:

- PaneFilterConfig with include/exclude rules in config.rs
- ObservationDecision enum with Observed/Ignored variants
- PaneRegistry with filter integration and re-evaluation
- PaneRecord persistence with observation fields
- Runtime integration: only observed panes get tailed
- Comprehensive tests for filter precedence and matching

Closes: wa-4vx.4.11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
